title: How It Works
description: This modal explains how the reporting system works

steps.title: Step 1: Select the issue
steps.description: Choose the type of problem you want to report

steps.title: Step 2: Provide details
steps.description: Add more information about the issue

faqs.question: How long does it take to process a report?
faqs.answer: Reports are usually processed within 24-48 hours.

faqs.question: Can I edit my report after submission?
faqs.answer: No, once submitted you cannot edit the report.

faqs.question: Will I be notified about the report status?
